0.q: heterologous expression of a relA-spoT homologue (Sj-RSH) isolated from the halophilic plant Suaeda japonica in the yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae results in accumulation of ppGpp, accompanied by enhancement of tolerance against various stress stimuli
The complementation analysis shown in Fig. 3 strongly suggests that Sj-RSH has (p)ppGpp synthetase activity, as well as bacterial RelA and At-RSH1.
